div.style: background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dfe1e6; border-radius: 0 0 4px 4px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px;

label.style: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #dfe1e6; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;

input.style: margin-right: 10px; width: 18px; height: 18px;

textarea.placeholder: Enter clinical notes, observations, or recommendations...
textarea.style: border: 1px solid #dfe1e6; border-radius: 3px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; width: 100%; resize: vertical;

label.style: display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 13px; color: #5e6c84; font-weight: 600;

input.style: border: 1px solid #dfe1e6; border-radius: 3px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; width: 100%;

label.style: display: flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer;

input.style: margin-right: 10px; width: 18px; height: 18px;
border: 1px solid #dfe1e6; border-radius: 3px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 14px; width: 100%;

footer.style: display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 32px; background: #fafafa; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;

button.style: padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #dfe1e6; border-radius: 3px; background: #fff; color: #42526e;
padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 3px; background: #0052cc; color: #fff;
